risk: Unauthorised disclosure of full judgments or source blocks
controls: Private repository; least privilege; MFA; public-minimal release

risk: Publication of protected identity or sensitive family/criminal information
controls: Sensitive-content review; manual approval; suppression procedure

risk: Incorrect headnote, ratio or held point
controls: Source verification; two-person editorial review; correction log
Official-heading gate; anomaly queue; manual review

risk: Unlawful public redistribution of source judgments
controls: Private default; rights analysis; separate data licence
Source and record hashes; validation; immutable releases

risk: Use of dataset for unapproved model training
controls: Access policy; deployment boundaries; processor controls

risk: Cross-border access through cloud or GitHub
controls: Transfer assessment; private hosting decision; contractual safeguards

risk: Failure to respond to correction or data-subject request
controls: Request register; named owner; documented procedure
MFA; unique accounts; secret scanning; prompt revocation

risk: Backups retain corrected or suppressed records indefinitely
controls: Backup rotation; restore procedure; legal-hold process

risk: Third-party AI or API provider retains submitted judgment text
controls: No provider use without contract and assessment; minimisation
Explicit record type; release gate; tests and review queue

risk: Source corpus incomplete for a court station
controls: Coverage disclosure; inventory reconciliation; source acquisition plan

risk: Automated public-minimal release still enables re-identification
controls: Remove names and narratives; review quasi-identifiers; approval
